feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Route 9, the physical trainer road toward Rock Tunnel.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red marked Route 9 as a trainer lane and told Antman to treat it as preparation, not filler.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill warned that Rock Tunnel will need darkness planning before the Lavender signal can be followed safely.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight stepped into the open on Route 9, connecting sleep signals to the Lavender tower frequency.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Rocket supply cache was found near Moonlight's mark, suggesting both groups are probing the same tunnel route.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill confirmed the Echo Flute trace bends through Rock Tunnel toward Lavender Tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rock Tunnel entry is now unlocked as the next story route.
